ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crops" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop */,
  "crop_name" TEXT /* Name of the crop */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of the crop (e.g., grain, vegetable, fruit) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the crop is grown */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of cultivation */,
  "crop_variety" TEXT /* Specific variety of the crop */,
  "crop_lifecycle" TEXT /* Lifecycle stage of the crop (e.g., planting, growing, harvesting) */,
  "crop_yield_potential" TEXT /* Estimated yield potential of the crop */,
  "crop_resistance" TEXT /* Resilience to diseases and pests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "farmers" (
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each farmer */,
  "farmer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the farmer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the farmer */,
  "farm_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the farm */,
  "farmer_type" TEXT /* Type of farmer (e.g., small-scale, large-scale) */,
  "farming_experience" INTEGER /* Years of farming experience */,
  "farming_methods" TEXT /* Common farming methods used */,
  "farmer_education" TEXT /* Education level of the farmer */,
  "farmer_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "farmer_address" TEXT /* Full address of the farmer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the agricultural site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the site */,
  "farmer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the farmer managing the site */,
  "site_area" REAL /* Area of the agricultural site in hectares */,
  "site_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "site_soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the site */,
  "site_climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  "site_ownership" TEXT /* Ownership status of the site (e.g., owned, leased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_farmer_id FOREIGN KEY ("farmer_id") REFERENCES farmers ("farmer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "soil_quality" (
  "soil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil quality record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agricultural site */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level of the soil */,
  "organic_matter" REAL /* Percentage of organic matter in the soil */,
  "nutrients" TEXT /* Available nutrients in the soil */,
  "last_tested" TEXT /* Date when the soil was last tested */,
  "soil_texture" TEXT /* Texture of the soil (e.g., sandy, loamy, clay) */,
  "soil_depth" REAL /* Depth of the soil in centimeters */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Moisture content of the soil */,
  "soil_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the soil */,
  "soil_salinity" REAL /* Salinity level of the soil */,
  "soil_structure" TEXT /* Structure of the soil (e.g., granular, blocky) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("soil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_quality_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agricultural site */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "temperature_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "temperature_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Speed of the wind in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Amount of solar radiation */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agricultural site */,
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crop harvested */,
  "harvest_date" TEXT /* Date of the harvest */,
  "yield_amount" REAL /* Amount of crop yield per unit area */,
  "yield_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the yield (e.g., grade, color) */,
  "yield_market_price" REAL /* Market price of the yield */,
  "yield_sales_volume" REAL /* Volume of the yield sold */,
  "yield_storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the yield is stored */,
  "yield_processing_method" TEXT /* Method used to process the yield */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yields_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crop_yields_crop_id FOREIGN KEY ("crop_id") REFERENCES crops ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, farmer, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "user_supervisor" TEXT /* Supervisor of the user */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geolocation of the access */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_id")
)
